WHAT HALU™ DOES

One agent. Every department.
Continuous results.

HALU™ is not a chatbot or a dashboard tool. It's an autonomous agentic intelligence layer that runs across your entire business simultaneously — communicating with each department, surfacing issues, generating tasks, and delivering results without waiting for a human to ask.

💬
Department Communication
HALU™ maintains active threads with Sales, Marketing, Ops, Finance and Leadership simultaneously — routing the right information to the right team in real time.
🔍
Revenue Leak Detection
Continuously monitors pipeline, campaign and operational data for leakage patterns. Flags exactly where money is slipping through — before it compounds.
✅
Action Item Generation
HALU™ doesn't just surface problems — it creates assigned, prioritised action items and routes them to the right person without anyone having to coordinate.
🚨
Intelligent Escalation
Critical issues are escalated instantly — with full context and recommended resolution — so leadership acts on what matters, not noise.
📊
Zonar™ Metrics & Reporting
Live performance data — web analytics, CRM signals, campaign metrics — analysed and delivered as concise intelligence, not raw numbers.
📧
Email Drafting & Templates
HALU™ drafts and sends status update emails across departments using pre-built templates — populated with live data, no human input required.

HOW IT WORKS

Continuous. Autonomous.
Always running.

HALU™ runs a continuous loop across all departments — not a one-time analysis, not a monthly report. A live intelligence layer operating 24/7.

1
Monitor All Departments
HALU™ connects to your Sales, Marketing, Operations, Finance and Leadership workflows — monitoring activity, data signals and communication threads in real time.
2
Analyse & Surface Insights
Cross-references data across departments to identify disconnects, revenue leaks, bottlenecks and missed opportunities that no single team can see on their own.
3
Generate Actions & Route Them
Creates specific, assigned action items and routes them to the right person — automatically. No meetings, no chase-ups, no dropped balls.
4
Deliver Results to Leadership
Sends concise performance summaries, escalation alerts and strategic recommendations directly to leadership — so decisions are made on live data, not last month's report.

FAQ

Common questions about HALU™.

What is the difference between HALU™ and Zonar OS™? +
Zonar OS™ is the AI operating platform — the infrastructure underneath your business. HALU™ is the autonomous agent that runs on Zonar OS™. Think of Zonar OS™ as the operating system and HALU™ as the intelligent app doing the work. See the full comparison →
Can HALU™ run without Zonar OS™? +
Yes. HALU™ deploys as a standalone agent on top of your existing CRM, analytics and communication tools. No rip-and-replace. Zonar OS™ is the enterprise upgrade that gives HALU™ deeper access and enhanced performance.
How does HALU™ actually monitor my departments? +
HALU™ connects to your existing data sources — CRM, email, project management, analytics — and runs a continuous monitoring loop across all departments. It doesn't wait to be asked. It proactively surfaces issues, generates action items and routes intelligence in real time.
Is HALU™ available as a white-label product? +
Yes — on the Enterprise tier. You can license HALU™ under your own brand and sell it to your clients. Contact support@neuralhorizonsai.com for white-label pricing.

PRICING

Deploy HALU™ in your business.

From a single department pilot to full enterprise deployment with white-label licensing. All plans include Neural Horizons AI onboarding and setup.

Starter
HALU™ Lite
AED 8,500 / month
Single department. Ideal for testing HALU™ on one revenue-critical workflow before rolling out company-wide.
  • 1 department connected
  • Revenue leak monitoring
  • Action item generation
  • Weekly intelligence summaries
  • Email + chat support
  • Neural Horizons AI onboarding
Start with Free Audit
MOST POPULAR
Growth
HALU™ Pro
AED 22,000 / month
Full cross-department Command Centre. HALU™ runs across all departments simultaneously — monitoring, routing and acting 24/7.
  • Up to 5 departments connected
  • Real-time Command Centre dashboard
  • Intelligent escalation engine
  • CRM + analytics integration
  • Zonar™ Metrics live reporting
  • Automated email drafting
  • Dedicated success manager
⚡ Get Started
Enterprise
HALU™ Enterprise
Custom pricing
Full Zonar OS™ + HALU™ deployment. Built to your organisation's architecture — including white-label licensing to resell as your own product.
  • Unlimited departments
  • Custom AI model training
  • Full API + webhook integration
  • White-label option available
  • On-site deployment support
  • SLA guarantee
  • Quarterly strategy reviews
Contact for Pricing

All prices in AED. Annual contracts available at 15% discount. Global clients welcome.
